reviews.review_description: I genuinely dont understand how there are ANY people who would give this game a review over 2 stars. Its generic, repeated shooter slop. With AI voices doing all the acting, which is so bad its actually painful to the ears. The pauses between words, the horrible pronunciation. And the controls, while functional are downright lazy with their mechanics. Download this for free if you have the option, and give it a try. But if you can legitimately play this game for more than an hour? Honestly, respect.

It's corny as all hell but that is part of the appeal.  Just a fun goofy shooter with a story campaign.  It doesn't take itself serious and that makes it great.  I love all the cactus cowboy games but this is by far my favorite.  You can see the progression the developers have learned from one game to the next.  Can't wait for future titles!

reviews.review_title: Started off with the free ones...
reviews.review_description:
& without hesitation i have purchased the paid game... man am i looking forward to it, they are quirky, simplicity attractive & most of all the gun play is perfect for keeping a well needed eye on whats around the corner.
Different enemy's keep you on your toes, 
I absolutely love this game & everything about it (as a no nonsense pick up & play)

I have finished the free one yet, cant wait to get stuck in...
Before Ive even played it i know it was the best £8,99 I have spent in ages... the price of X2 coffees... for a whole load of fun...
Nice one  
 I am 48, a seasoned gamer that can honestly say this is breath of fresh air

Just like the 3rd and 4th cactus games, this game is great. At first, the trigger to use bolts instead of grip confused me, but this makes more sense than grip as it prevents accidentally grabbing the grip instead. The guns feel good to use, although the virtual stock option, enabled by default, causes your grip hand to not align properly with the hand you see. There are no enemies with excessive amounts of health, although bosses were a bit too easy, which I think is an overcorrection from the 3rd and 4th games, where bosses took forever to kill and I am sure this will be fixed in the 6th game. Medic plants no longer give infinite heals, which fixes the issue from the 4th game where you could become almost immortal by camping a medic plant, and encourages you to avoid damage. All enemy attacks are projectiles, so you can dodge bullets, although the bullets should be made faster. I think that the game would be even better if there was a very hard mode added, to provide a challenge that hard mode doesn't really give. Allies seem to no longer be stupid like they were in the 4th game, but I never saw my allies kill anything. Overall amazing game, and it also comes with 4 extra solo missions that I haven't tried yet.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review. I gonna keep a few things in mind during development of Cactus Cowboy - Thornageddon. Quick suggestion: At leasts play the Halloween solo mission ;-)

reviews.review_description: I can't tell you how much cactus cowboy resonates with me. It's definitely my top 10 games along with plants at war and fully loaded. Truly a gameplay over graphics game. Not the best looking, written, voice acted, orchestrated, etc. but it knows it and still delivers a solid experience. I’m not sure if the creator uses any AI programs for his games but it does feel like it imo. Still a fun little experience with serviceable gun play.

Only voice acting is AI, as I cannot afford real ppl. The rest is handcrafted, self written code and it will stay this way for future games! 
This game is older than the current AI Slop craze.

It ain’t horrible. Definitely better than that portal fan game (anyways why the hell did this series get a portal rip off?). Combat is fine. The game was pretty hard. And the gameplay was pretty fun. But the amount of Ai that went into this game was… a lot. I understand that the game was made by one person but still. Garbage band is free and you can make better voices. But I actually recommend getting this game at full price. I mean it’s made by one person who did it as a joke. And now look at where he is. 4.30/5 stars.

developer_response.body:
The voices is something I really want to do better next time! The AI Voice system I used went bankrup anyway (surprise?). It was actually a matter of $$ as my chin dropped wide when I realized how expensive actual dubbing is. When this game came out, AI use was too new to be a big of a deal for ppl. But I assure you other than the voices, everything here is handcrafted!
Anyway, I always take note from reviews here. Glad you had fun with my little cacti title. 

Happy new year 🚀

reviews.review_description: You can tell the developer has gotten better and listen to criticism and made this awesome game, If your the developer seeing this continue to make games (you don’t need to make another Cactus Cowboy you can branch out if you want)

developer_response.body: Thanks, I read every comment. I wanna branch out but there has to be one more CC game and that's in the works.

Tried every button combination, can't eject the clip to place a new one. If I can figure that out I'll be looking forward to playing more!

developer_response.body:
A button (Right hand, lower button) ejects mag.
Grab new mag from belt and insert it
Pull slider to prime gun
Shoot.

Most VR games I find are basically toys so coming across a real game is refreshing, especially when it's one I enjoy. The action is good and while the dialog is witty, it would be nice to have an option to play without extreme profanity (F-bombs), or profanity at all.  The TTS adds to the charm, and would make it easy to have a variant voice track here and there. (As an aside, if your TTS engine is reading text designed for phonetic clarity you can get much better results than from dialog intended for readers.)
I am also old enough to know that the loading sound is probably supposed to be from a floppy drive, and I absolutely love it.

Hope the dev makes enough money to maybe support voice actors for the next game, the dialog is good but it would be amazing to see what a voice actor or two would do with the script.

reviews.review_title: AMAZING, MUST BUY IF YOU LIKE CACTUS
reviews.review_description:
This game is AWESOME, if you like action, funny humor, war games, or cactus 🌵, then get this game. And if you have not played Cactus Cowboy Plants at War, then go play that first so you can get a feel of the Cactus Cowboy Series. Anyways, first off, storyline and gun play is awesome! You shoot your way through enemy bug bases, and also protect your fellow cacti 🌵, while also getting to find money all around the story and use that money to customize your guns! Such as adding lasers, new grips for your guns, optics, scopes, suppressors, and skins! And a lot of action, explosions, exploration, crashing helicopters, exploding helicopters, Mini-gun helicopters, and helicopters in general. And, the campaign is intense, funny, and addictive. And and a lot of guns to chose from, such as pistols, rifles, SMG’s, and maybe snipers, (I don’t know if there’s snipers because I have not completed the story yet), and grenade launchers, which you can explode helicopters with and kill packs of bugs in one shot. Only complaint is the mini-gun on the helicopter level is really glitchy and shaky, so maybe you can fix that in next bug fix. But just because you heard that doesn’t mean you shouldn’t buy the game. And there is so much more stuff I can say about this game that is amazing, but it would take forever to explain. So my overall rating is 20/10, and trust me, it’s gonna be a lot better then you think. Also, note for devs if your reading this, if your thinking of any other game idea for the series, I would do a nuclear warfare of some sort, or maybe Vietnam war or world war 1 would be cool to. Also, to make the game a bit better, maybe you can let the player fly the plane or helicopter, or drive the Jeep instead of always letting your fellow army cacti 🌵 do it. Anyways, your game is amazing, and I would love to buy any future game in the Cactus Cowboy series, no matter the price. Have a great day, and hope you make better more awesome games in the future. Now goodbye ima go beat the game. Also I hate the spiders there scary 😧
🌵

This game is good but if would choose a game  this or plant at war (paw) I would get paw because of it being free and a more memorable experience.
Yes there is new cool things like attachments a few new weapons and more but going around looking for money is not something this game was made for. I feel it was made as a fast run and gun. Not a slow searching for x game. 
I think I may have expected a little bit to much so I could just be a me problem but still a good game.


Now for what I think if you should get it or not 
Get it 
Although with a little bit lower expectations of what you may think from paw

developer_response.body:
Well, let me share my thoughts on the money / attachment system. I wanted to provide some sort of easy challenge everyone can do to unlock the attachments. Especially with the remote grab, I felt it's a good compromise for players desperate in need for some sort of aim assist like a red dot. 

Just FYI, I'm working on additional mini missions to be added to the game though its lifecycle. Maybe down the road, I gonna earn the last star back :D

reviews.review_description:
I highly recommend this game as it is very fun. The story and gameplay is just a blast. It is the call of duty of cactus/bugs. You can even customize your weapons so make sure to collect all the money scattered around the map. You have plentiful amount of ammo to complete the levels as well (at least on normal mode). So what are you waiting for? Go pew pew the enemies soldier cactus!
